channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oil prices drop after US-Iran deal announcement
item.description: Crude oil prices fell over 4% to their lowest in three months after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a ceasefire extension that could ease supply concerns.

item.title: Medicare weight-loss drug coverage may strain doctors
item.description: A new Medicare program offering weight-loss drugs for $50 monthly is expected to drive high demand for Wegovy and Zepbound.

item.title: U.S. and Iran reach deal to extend ceasefire and open strait
item.description: The U.S. and Iran have agreed to a 60-day ceasefire extension, with a signing ceremony expected Friday and nuclear talks to follow.

item.title: "They screwed us": Personality clashes sent Anthropic's models offline
item.description: Anthropic faces renewed scrutiny from the Trump administration due to communication failures, according to Axios sources.
